parameters.query: SELECT source_record_id AS "sourceRecordId", organization_id AS "organizationId", knowledge_source_id AS "knowledgeSourceId", version, json_agg(json_build_object('chunkId', id, 'chunkIndex', chunk_index, 'chunkText', chunk_text, 'chunkHash', chunk_hash) ORDER BY chunk_index) AS chunks FROM document_chunks WHERE embedding IS NULL AND embedding_model = 'pending' AND active = true GROUP BY source_record_id, organization_id, knowledge_source_id, version ORDER BY MIN(created_at) ASC LIMIT 25;

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = $input.all().map((item) => item.json ?? item);
return rows.map((row) => ({ json: { organizationId: row.organizationId, knowledgeSourceId: row.knowledgeSourceId, sourceRecordId: row.sourceRecordId, version: row.version, bundleChunkIds: Array.isArray(row.chunks) ? row.chunks.map((chunk) => chunk.chunkId) : [], chunks: row.chunks || [] } }));

parameters.query:
WITH embeddings AS (
  SELECT
    (vec->>'chunkId')::uuid AS chunk_id,
    vec->'vector' AS embedding,
    COALESCE('{{$json.embeddingModel}}', 'pending') AS embedding_model
  FROM jsonb_array_elements('{{$json.vectors}}'::jsonb) AS vec
), updated AS (
  UPDATE document_chunks dc
  SET embedding = e.embedding,
      embedding_model = e.embedding_model,
      updated_at = NOW()
  FROM embeddings e
  WHERE dc.id = e.chunk_id
    AND dc.organization_id = '{{$node["Build Embedding Payload"].json.organizationId}}'::uuid
    AND dc.source_record_id = '{{$node["Build Embedding Payload"].json.sourceRecordId}}'::uuid
    AND dc.version = '{{$node["Build Embedding Payload"].json.version}}'::int
  RETURNING dc.id
)
SELECT COUNT(*)::int AS "writtenCount" FROM updated;

UPDATE ingestion_jobs SET state = 'completed', finished_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW() WHERE organization_id = '{{$node["Build Embedding Payload"].json.organizationId}}'::uuid AND source_record_id = '{{$node["Build Embedding Payload"].json.sourceRecordId}}'::uuid AND state = 'processing' RETURNING id AS "jobId", state, retry_count AS "retryCount";

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { embedded: true, chunkCount: Array.isArray($node["Build Embedding Payload"].json.chunks) ? $node["Build Embedding Payload"].json.chunks.length : 0, organizationId: $node["Build Embedding Payload"].json.organizationId || null, knowledgeSourceId: $node["Build Embedding Payload"].json.knowledgeSourceId || null, sourceRecordId: $node["Build Embedding Payload"].json.sourceRecordId || null } }];
